description: Wild Blood Patch 2 (27 November 2023) — Season Winner Statues Added, Awakened Item Scaling Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Season Winner Statues Added
sections.searchable_text: Season Winner Statues Added Albion East Season 2: Winter Albion West Season 20: Escalation

sections.heading: Awakened Item Scaling Changes

items.text: Hellgates and Corrupted Dungeons now scale the power of Awakened Item Traits down to match the IP scaling in each location
The Item Power trait is not affected as it is already subject to IP scaling
The Mob Fame trait is not affected as it does not provide a combat advantage

Note that Traits that scale with Item Power will be scaled back twice - this is intentional as the purpose for this location-based scaling is to scale bonus Traits relative to the power already allowed in the area

sections.searchable_text: Awakened Item Scaling Changes Hellgates and Corrupted Dungeons now scale the power of Awakened Item Traits down to match the IP scaling in each location 2v2 Hellgates: 100% → 20% 5v5 and 10v10 Hellgates: 100% → 35% Stalker Corrupted Dungeons: 100% → 20% Slayer Corrupted Dungeons: 100% → 50% The Item Power trait is not affected as it is already subject to IP scaling The Mob Fame trait is not affected as it does not provide a combat advantage Note that Traits that scale with Item Power will be scaled back twice - this is intentional as the purpose for this location-based scaling is to scale bonus Traits relative to the power already allowed in the area

sections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: Farm Animals now display their favorite food as overhead icons when hungry (other animals without a favorite food use the original carrot / meat icons)

subitems.text: Target direction of spells that can change target while casting can now be adjusted via right stick on gamepad
Added custom controller navigation, preview window, and quick actions to Destiny Board
Using right stick to scroll window content with controller now only scrolls parent window of selected element
When targeting skill shots and ground spells manually, closest enemy/ally to target area will be selected and locked if no other target is locked
Claim Rewards UI now scales up larger for smaller devices

items.text: Adventurer Vanity Skins (Rogue, Knight, Mage) are now available for Gold via Appearance UI - each piece can be purchased individually
Updated translations of Victory Emote names for some languages

sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Farm Animals now display their favorite food as overhead icons when hungry (other animals without a favorite food use the original carrot / meat icons) Controller changes Target direction of spells that can change target while casting can now be adjusted via right stick on gamepad Added custom controller navigation, preview window, and quick actions to Destiny Board Using right stick to scroll window content with controller now only scrolls parent window of selected element Mobile changes Added proximity tooltips to Wisps When targeting skill shots and ground spells manually, closest enemy/ally to target area will be selected and locked if no other target is locked Claim Rewards UI now scales up larger for smaller devices Adventurer Vanity Skins (Rogue, Knight, Mage) are now available for Gold via Appearance UI - each piece can be purchased individually Updated translations of Victory Emote names for some languages

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Raging Blades (all Axes) Energy Cost: 11 → 9 Damage: 24 → 28 Razor Cut (Bear Paws) Bleed Damage Ticks: 6 → 3 Bleed Damage Duration: 7s → 4s

subsections.heading: Bows

subitems.text: Improved Hit Detection on max range

subsections.searchable_text: Bows Demon Arrow (Wailing Bow) Projectile Speed: 24 m/s → 28 m/s Improved Hit Detection on max range Damage

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs

subitems.text: Damage can no longer be reflected

subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs Enfeeble Blades (Lifecurse Staff) Damage can no longer be reflected

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Assassin Spirit (all Daggers) Assassin Spirit Charge Interval: 3s → 2.5s

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Hail (Great Frost Staff) Damage: 142 → 160

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs

subitems.text: Now immune to healing while resurrecting

subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Reality Fissure (all Shapeshifter Staffs) Shift Charges gained on 2nd hit: 2 → 1 Adapting Matter (all Shapeshifter Staffs) Max Allies: 3 → 5 Shield: 140 → 150 Wild Onslaught (Primal Staff) 1st Cast Cooldown: 12s → 15s 2nd Cast Shift Charges needed: 0 → 1 2nd Cast Cooldown: 15s → 18s Distortion (all Shapeshifter Staffs) Damage per tick: 80 → 70 Runestone Golem Transformation Duration: 20s → 18s Giant Consumption (Runestone Golem Passive) Shift Charge Consumption: every 3.5s → every 3s Return from Hell (Imp Passive) Now immune to healing while resurrecting

subsections.heading: Armors

subitems.text: Added Visual Indication for Invisibility Radius (only visible to caster)

subsections.searchable_text: Armors Ambush (Assassin Jacket, all Gathering Armors) Cooldown: 60s → 50s Invisibility Duration: 8s → 7s Hit Delay: 0s → 0.2s Invisibility Radius: 14m → 15m Added Visual Indication for Invisibility Radius (only visible to caster) Protective Instinct (all Plate Armors) Threat Generation: 300% → 400%

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Spider's Thread (Duskweaver Helmet) Cooldown 1st Cast: 20s → 15s Energy Cost 1st Cast: 0 → 3% max energy Cooldown 2nd Cast: 25s → 20s Energy Cost 2nd Cast: 0 → 5% max energy

sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Axes Raging Blades (all Axes) Razor Cut (Bear Paws) Bows Demon Arrow (Wailing Bow) Cursed Staffs Enfeeble Blades (Lifecurse Staff) Daggers Assassin Spirit (all Daggers) Frost Staffs Hail (Great Frost Staff) Shapeshifter Staffs Reality Fissure (all Shapeshifter Staffs) Adapting Matter (all Shapeshifter Staffs) Wild Onslaught (Primal Staff) Distortion (all Shapeshifter Staffs) Runestone Golem Giant Consumption (Runestone Golem Passive) Return from Hell (Imp Passive) Armors Ambush (Assassin Jacket, all Gathering Armors) Protective Instinct (all Plate Armors) Helmets Spider's Thread (Duskweaver Helmet) Cooldown 1st Cast: 20s → 15s Energy Cost 1st Cast: 0 → 3% max energy Cooldown 2nd Cast: 25s → 20s Energy Cost 2nd Cast: 0 → 5% max energy Capes Force Pulse (Avalonian Cape)

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue with loot protection where PvP-flagged players could temporarily lock players out of their loot in red and yellow zones
Fixed issue where Power Cores, Energy Crystals, and Wisps could move into unreachable areas
Fixed issue where skillshots sometimes cast in wrong direction when rooted
Fixed issue where Runestone Fragments would stay alive longer than intended after the Runestone Golem was already dead
Runestone Golem no longer re-casts invincible state, including summons, on subsequent encounters if the health threshold was reached in a previous encounter
Fixed issue where the Cook could create fishing bait at a higher tier than its own
Some Morgana Cultists that didn't use their summon imp spell will now do so again
Fixed issue where players could walk around and switch windows with Gold Market UI open
Fixed issue where Hellfire and Sticky Potions thrown by multiple enemies that were not allied could stack
Other faction enemies (Undead, Keeper, Morgana) will no longer appear in Tier 3 Heretic Randomized Dungeons, as the tiers of these other Factions were too high
Fixed issue where Farming Territories did not give their yield bonus to crops
Initial heal of Spirit Animal (Rampant Staff) now also heals the caster
Fixed issue where thrown snowballs were sometimes invisible

subitems.text: Dynamic action hint would not reappear after opening UI via cursor
Death Recap quick action did not show when first entering death screen
First UI selection did not show cursor even when toggled on
Initial UI window selections did not move cursor to selection
HUD "Settings" button not working using mouse when Nintendo Switch Pro controller connected
Character Inspect Hint in targeting UI would appear when a mob was selected
[iOS] App would remain open after being closed via controller from main menu

items.text: [MOBILE] Fixed issue where "Changelog" notification showed in every session even after viewing
Additional minor graphical, animation, audio, terrain, UI, and localization fixes
